creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I also note that when I tried to assign this issue to kp@, the following error was returned by Bugzilla requesting additional information:

===========================
FreeBSD Bugzilla cannot make a conclusive match for one or more of the names and/or email addresses you entered on the previous page.
Please examine the lists of potential matches below and select the ones you want, or go back to the previous page to revise the names you entered. 

Assignee: 	
kp@ matched:

[<list of users matching *kp@*>]
=============================
